## Meeting Purpose

[Wrap up Hypermode's engagement with GrowthX, discussing final deliverables and performance insights.](https://fathom.video/share/yKpMVmsrBxs8JGgt8pty8YCakV6YQpms?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [44 articles published; 6 more to be completed today and published tonight](https://fathom.video/share/yKpMVmsrBxs8JGgt8pty8YCakV6YQpms?tab=summary&timestamp=92.0)
  - [Site performance dipped post D-Graph content migration; likely due to natural search volume fluctuations](https://fathom.video/share/yKpMVmsrBxs8JGgt8pty8YCakV6YQpms?tab=summary&timestamp=105.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide lessons learned and insights for potential future collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/yKpMVmsrBxs8JGgt8pty8YCakV6YQpms?tab=summary&timestamp=215.0)
  - [Slack channel to remain open until mid-next week for final communications](https://fathom.video/share/yKpMVmsrBxs8JGgt8pty8YCakV6YQpms?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)

## Topics

### Content Status and Handover

  - [44 articles published to date](https://fathom.video/share/yKpMVmsrBxs8JGgt8pty8YCakV6YQpms?tab=summary&timestamp=92.0)
  - [6 more topics to be completed today and published tonight](https://fathom.video/share/yKpMVmsrBxs8JGgt8pty8YCakV6YQpms?tab=summary&timestamp=95.0)
  - [Jessica to retain access to Airtable and associated Google Docs](https://fathom.video/share/yKpMVmsrBxs8JGgt8pty8YCakV6YQpms?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
  - [Looker dashboard accessibility dependent on Google Search Console access](https://fathom.video/share/yKpMVmsrBxs8JGgt8pty8YCakV6YQpms?tab=summary&timestamp=14.0)
  - [Google Analytics not critical for Hypermode's tracking needs](https://fathom.video/share/yKpMVmsrBxs8JGgt8pty8YCakV6YQpms?tab=summary&timestamp=30.0)

### Performance Analysis

  - [Overall website performance showing a slight decline after D-Graph content migration](https://fathom.video/share/yKpMVmsrBxs8JGgt8pty8YCakV6YQpms?tab=summary&timestamp=105.0)
  - [Hypothesis: Natural decline due to varying search volume, not competitor activity](https://fathom.video/share/yKpMVmsrBxs8JGgt8pty8YCakV6YQpms?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)
  - [Specific metrics:](https://fathom.video/share/yKpMVmsrBxs8JGgt8pty8YCakV6YQpms?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
      - [Small bump in average positions across categories](https://fathom.video/share/yKpMVmsrBxs8JGgt8pty8YCakV6YQpms?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
      - [Small dip in Click-Through Rate (CTR)](https://fathom.video/share/yKpMVmsrBxs8JGgt8pty8YCakV6YQpms?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
  - [Potential factors for performance dip:](https://fathom.video/share/yKpMVmsrBxs8JGgt8pty8YCakV6YQpms?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0)
    1.  High traction on 3 specific articles previously, not replicated this week
    2.  Possible site cannibalization due to undefined search space
    3.  Temporary lag from publishing 3 articles weeks ago

### Future Insights and Collaboration

  - [GrowthX to provide:](https://fathom.video/share/yKpMVmsrBxs8JGgt8pty8YCakV6YQpms?tab=summary&timestamp=215.0)
      - [Lessons learned from the engagement](https://fathom.video/share/yKpMVmsrBxs8JGgt8pty8YCakV6YQpms?tab=summary&timestamp=215.0)
      - [Insights and guidance for potential future collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/yKpMVmsrBxs8JGgt8pty8YCakV6YQpms?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
      - [Key takeaways and early hypotheses](https://fathom.video/share/yKpMVmsrBxs8JGgt8pty8YCakV6YQpms?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
  - [Acknowledgment of short engagement and early stage of the space limiting full optimization](https://fathom.video/share/yKpMVmsrBxs8JGgt8pty8YCakV6YQpms?tab=summary&timestamp=220.0)

### Wrap-up Logistics

  - [GrowthX to keep Slack channel open until mid-next week](https://fathom.video/share/yKpMVmsrBxs8JGgt8pty8YCakV6YQpms?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)
  - [Final report to be shared via Slack and email](https://fathom.video/share/yKpMVmsrBxs8JGgt8pty8YCakV6YQpms?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)
  - [GrowthX team available for future inquiries or potential re-engagement](https://fathom.video/share/yKpMVmsrBxs8JGgt8pty8YCakV6YQpms?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)
